title: Best-so-far performance decay
summary: Track how far the current lap’s pace has fallen from the driver’s best prior observed pace in the same race.
rationale: Future-looking stint minima are unsafe, but causal best-so-far features preserve a similar performance-decay concept. The run explicitly pruned future-looking stint summaries and favored current/past alternatives.
implementation_hint: Within each race-driver sequence, compute prior cumulative best or median-low `LapTime_Delta`/pace residual, then add current minus prior-best, current minus prior rolling median, and late-race decay flags. Use shifted cumulative statistics only.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: A single anomalous fast lap can distort best-so-far; consider robust prior quantile approximations or clipped differences.
